gist.headline: Say hello to Samina 🍂
gist.blurb: A new Telegram bot named Samina just sprouted in our community greenhouse. It brings entertainment features and generates images right in your chats using the /img command.
gist.summary: Added the Samina Telegram bot to the community apps showcase, featuring entertainment tools and integrated image generation.
gist.impact: Users can now discover and interact with Samina on Telegram to easily generate images via Pollinations.
gist.visual_concept: A Telegram bot named Samina (with an autumn leaf motif) added to the greenhouse. Visuals: paper airplane (Telegram), autumn leaves, greenhouse setting, Polly the bee welcoming the new addition.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny autumn leaf scarf, happily flying alongside a pixelated paper airplane inside a warm, glowing greenhouse. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel peach gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
